reviews.review_description:
This is a fantastic theme park and dark ride experience, even if it is early access and only has one dark ride currently. Even the haunted castle ride, though the actual ride is not here yet, has a sizable amount of stuff to see and a couple great jump scares! Great job!
The only negative is the wait. I realize it is only a one person team so I understand, but apparently it’s been over a year for the next ride and it hasn’t come out yet. At this rate it’s looking like it might be a couple more years before we have Acts 2 and 3 out, if they even happen. But regardless of the long wait, I still think what is here deserves 5 stars.
This is leaps and bounds higher quality than other dark rides on the platform - really impressive. I cannot wait to see more.

From what I've seen so far the quality and experience is good but I've been waiting since last year for the Haunted experience which was promised in 2025. I hope they haven't given up because I am EAGERLY awaiting to see this experience.

developer_response.body:
Not given up as the Haunted Castle is 75% complete and is coming in the months to come.  Been at it for 2 years now and it is an epic 26 minute, highly detailed dark ride with real person narration, a composer and band for all the original music.  Cannot wait to share. Hope I can earn more stars as it seems most only buy because of the good rating. 

If  you cannot wait, feel free to join my Discord and get on the Alpha channel to see behind the scene an imagineering and help shape the ride’s completion.  

Thanks for the review.

reviews.review_description: I purchased this game almost a year ago, giving the developers a chance to make something good, nothing has changed since it is just exactly the same, this game is a scam, don't waste your money!

developer_response.body:
Hi, I appreciate that you supported the park early on. Thank you.

This is a one developer project, and I’m actively building the next major dark ride, The Haunted Castle, which is about 75% complete. It’s a 26 minute, fully narrated experience with an original score and live musicians, and I’m incredibly excited to share it when it’s ready.  I wish it was ready by now, but it has been a heck of a year fighting the enshitification in the developer space with all the tools I use. Oh well. I grind away.

Development takes time because I prioritize depth, detail, and polish over rushing content out. The current experience is exactly what’s described on the store page, and everything new is being added as a free expansion for existing guests. As more major rides are added, the price for new buyers will increase to reflect the growing content.

If you’d like to see progress behind the scenes or help shape the ride’s completion, you’re welcome to join the Discord and apply for Alpha access, and share development updates there regularly.

I understand wanting more, that’s a great sign really as while your 1* review, you clearly love the app more than that or why would you demand more.  Ahahaha. I hope as the park continues to grow, you’ll consider revisiting your rating as your early support genuinely helps keep a project like this moving forward versus me just giving up if people really do hate my app.

reviews.review_title: THIS is what VR is for! Jaw-dropping!
reviews.review_description:
Wow! I debated for some time whether to buy this because of the cheesy image of a guy wearing a VR headset. I thought no way this could be aesthetically pleasing. I was prepared for something akin to Gorilla Tag with hacked together graphics, but was proven completely wrong! And I do mean completely. It’s STUNNING! DO NOT LET THE FIRST IMAGE OF THIS APP DISSUADE YOU FROM TRYING IT!

I love amusement park rides, particularly these “sit and watch” ones, but live in Japan where standing in line 2+ HOURS for a 2-minute ride is considered acceptable, and there’s no true fast pass outside of incredibly expensive VIP “guided tours” etc. That’s what brought me to Theme Park. No lines, yet somehow it includes the thrill of not just walking up to and boarding a ride, but even seeing other people boarding behind you. I have not lived a boring life — lived in 5 countries, come from a mediumship background etc. But I have to say using this app was one of the most amazing experiences of my life. It was literally like being transported to a real-life theme park, and riding a real sit and observe-style ride.

This is 100% the next Walkabout Mini Golf. I’m shocked it’s not better known, but think it can absolutely become one of those games people buy VR headsets for. 

If the developer can expand his team to speed up production, I can absolutely see this being like Walkabout with regular expansions and a loyal fan base (which I am now part of). If you are concerned about only using this once, DON’T! There is SO much detail, it’s literally impossible to take it all in during a single ride. This is something you can enjoy at least 3-5 times, likely many, many more times.

Completely blown away. THANK YOU FOR YOUR HARD WORK!!! Incredibly excited to see what’s next!

developer_response.body:
Wow.  I might be blushing here.  Ahahaha.  Yes, it is a labor of love for sure.  Wait till you see The Haunted Castle as it is even more detailed and bigger than Into the Metaverse. It will surprise you.  Will be a free update along with a refresh of Into the Metaverse sometime this year.  Hoping to start marketing the app post the addition of the next ride and if luck will have it, I will make enough money to hire people as 1 person is just too slow for an entire theme park, even with AI help.  Been at it for 6 years full time now. Wow   

Feel free to join the Discord https://discord.gg/ZJPN6fHQEF and if you would like to see the 75% complete Haunted Castle, ask to join the ALPHA. 

Thanks so much for the passionate review

reviews.review_description: Never got updated

developer_response.body:
Ah another painful to read scam from someone who has made no effort to reach out to me or the community. Really sucks as I am working the hardest I have ever in my life, but get to wake up to 1* reviews. The irony is all but 1, 1* review are just people who are angry that there is not more which has knocked me out of the top 10 lists, which killed my sales, and in turn made development much slower over the past couple of years.

The good news is, I have a massive update coming in the next week or so that I am sure you will enjoy and when it hits, I really hope you can update this review then as it really is destroying the will to continue and this is the only Theme Park in the Metaverse that really feels like a Theme Park and I need support not anger. If you cannot wait, feel free to join my Discord and get access to the ALPHA and help me with real feedback and not this scam nonsense as that is so not helpful and there really is no scam so this is libel as all the free updates were never part of the original sale.  In fact most would make the next ride an in app purchase, but I am planning to update for free.

reviews.review_description: Really great graphics on totally felt like I was at the park!

developer_response.body: Wait till you see the free update coming in early 2026.  It is called  The Haunted Castle, and it is shaping up to be a cut above Into the Metaverse in every way including graphics, length, number of audio animatronics and much more...even has a real narrator, musician and band. Thanks for taking the time to leave a review.

reviews.review_description: Looking forward to more in the future!

developer_response.body: I am blushing.  So glad you enjoyed it.  I am super heads down on  The Haunted Castle which is shaping up to be a cut above Into the Metaverse in every way including scope, length, number of audio animatronics and much more...even has a real narrator, musician and band. Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description:
Let’s go🔥🔥🔥 this app is more 
immersive than Epcots spaceship earth this was worth every penny

developer_response.body: I am blushing.  So glad you enjoyed it.  I am super heads down on  The Haunted Castle which is shaping up to be a cut above Into the Metaverse in every way include scope, length, number of audio animatronics and much more...even has a real narrator, musician and band.

reviews.review_description: This is my first Meta Quest review for anything, and it’s because this experience is a must for anyone who loves theme parks, as I do. Even in its unfinished state, this experience transports you to a theme park that feels real. This isn’t a cheap or lazy experience - you can feel the passion the dev pours into this. 5 stars!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review!!!  They really keep me going as this app really is a labour or love.  For the past 2 years I have been Imagineering The Haunted Castle dark ride and it getting nearer to completion.  The current ~25 min ride is in every way more ambitious than Into the Metaverse, and according to my ALPHA testers, even more magical too.  If you like to see the progress and behind the scenes Imagineering of the ride feel free to join my Discord and ask about access to the ALPHA builds. If you rather wait for the completed ride, it will be a free update in the store I am hoping for by Christmas but we will see that the quality of the experience is my top priority versus meeting a specific date.

reviews.review_description: Reminds me of the ride in Orlando 🙂 Beautifully detailed and can’t wait for The Haunted Castle. Love it!

developer_response.body: I cannot wait to bring you The Haunted Castle as it is shaping up to be a very immersive experience.

reviews.review_description: I love the coaster, and cannot wait for the rest!  I bought this app knowing it was in the early stages of development, so I knew there would be a wait for more.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review.  It really helps others discover and gives me that boost I need on days when I am grinding through issues with the tech.  The Haunted Castle is 80% complete now and my Alpha testers praise it as even better than Into the Metaverse.  It is a 26 min epic ride that will shock you.  It will be in the store I am hoping for by the end of the year, but we will see as there really are a lot of tech issues with the Meta platform this year that have really slowed me down. If you cannot wait to experience, come on over to my Discord and ask for access to the Alpha.

Thanks again for taking the time to review.

reviews.review_description: This is a great app already. Into the Metaverse blew my mind! It was so immersing, and everything was just great to look at and learn about. I CAN NOT wait for Dark Castle and all the other rides to open! You have something truly amazing going with this one. Please keep it up!

developer_response.body:
Me alegra mucho que hayas disfrutado de Into the Metaverse y estás emocionado por la llegada de Haunted Castle a finales de este año. Haunted Castle cuenta con 26 minutos de la atracción Imagineered, que ya está funcionando en ALPHA y ya supera a Into the Metaverse tanto en gráficos como en alcance. Está en inglés, pero tengo pensado añadir español y muchos otros idiomas tanto a Into the Metaverse como a Haunted Castle una vez que este último esté completo. Si te gusta el trabajo entre bastidores de Imagineering, no dudes en unirte al Discord y preguntar por el canal ALPHA (en español está bien, ya que puedo traducir y acepto todos los idiomas). De lo contrario, búscalo aquí en la tienda a finales de año, ya que será una actualización gratuita para quienes tengan Theme Park en su biblioteca.
Gracias por la reseña y espero traer más en los próximos años.

Traducido del ingles

reviews.review_description: The "Into the Metaverse" was epic and really exceeded my expectations.  Can't wait for the others to be ready!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review as it really does help to keep me going.  You will be happy to learn that The Haunted Castle dark ride is currently being Imagineered and it is a 25 minute, very immersive, and magical experience that really shows off VR Dark Rides even more than Act 1 of Into the Metaverse.  I am so excited about it.  It will be a free update later this year so keep your eyes on your notifications.  If you cannot wait, feel free to join my Discord and get on the ALPHA channel and see the behind the scenes Imagineering process, plus access to that door with the keypad :-)

reviews.review_description:
Very cool idea. The developer is creating a virtual theme park for showcasing dark rides in VR. So far the first act of one ride is complete and that is "Into The Metaverse" a ride that is quite similar to Spaceship Earth at Disney World Epcot, the story is based around the history of how we tell stories through the ages.
The look and sound of the characters in the ride is fantastic. The creator has done a good job capturing the way animatronics look and sound in a dark ride. 
Although please record the narration with a proper voice eventually :) hearing that AI voice we hear in YouTube videos all the time does break the immersion a little bit.

I think it's a very interesting idea and I'm excited to see it progress. Happy to support it and I would recommend you do too, if you like theme parks and think the idea of a virtual theme park that isn't just VR rollercoasters is cool, give it a try.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review and some thoughts on how things can be improved.  I really appreciate that.  You will be happy to know that the Haunted Castle Dark Ride coming out later this year, has a real voice actor and is it really really good. All the music was performed and written by a talented person too and there is even a full band in the ride.  I cannot wait to share.  In terms of Into the Metaverse, I have been waiting to finish it to update the voice, but based on your feedback, I will see if I can update Act 1 when I update the park later this year as I agree…if it something that  can detract.  


Keep your eyes open for the free update as The Haunted Castle is a 25 minute, magical experience.

reviews.review_description:
I went on this and think it is so creative but I couldn't quite figure out the Haunted house part. Looking forward to seeing what comes next!
I am glad I read the reviews so I understood this is in different parts.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review!!! The Haunted Castle will be a free update to the Theme Park later this year and it is already 75% complete and is even better than Into the Metaverse according to my community of ALPHA testers.  If you like to see, come on over the the Discord and reach out to me there for access: https://discord.gg/CaqCdqq7Vw

reviews.review_title: Just what I was looking for
reviews.review_description:
I love theme parks, when I go to a theme park, dark rides are my favorite thing to ride there. This app has both of them. It’s a theme park of dark rides. More than just a game really, this app is shaping up to be a full on theme park made up of four vastly different dark rides. 

Ignore the bad reviews, what you are actually buying is a lifetime ticket to a virtual theme park. I can’t wait to see this one evolve to its full potential.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review! You will be happy to learn that the Theme Park I hope will be more than the 1 ride today as The Haunted Castle dark ride is well underway and will be in the park later this year as a free update to all who own the app, and eventually it will be all 4 ride areas you see in the park today and more if things go the way I hope over time.  I really need to put up the overall vision map of the park somewhere and complete the 3D birds eye view model of the park that clearly shows its two sides, the edutainment and fantasy sides. 

In terms of the bad reviews, only 1 is actually someone not liking it, the others loved it, but are angry there is not more which is a pill hard to swallow as I too wish there were more, but the economics of  apps on the Meta Quest means I am soloing it for now. Reviews like yours help and thus thank you and I very much look forward to bringing you more, and since you joined the ALPHA channel, I am very much looking forward to your input on the Imagineering process.

reviews.review_description: I love being able to support independent creators making unique and exciting experiences like this. VR is the perfect platform for this kind of storytelling—it does it better than any other medium. Having grown up riding Disney dark rides, this feels right at home, and now I can experience it anytime I want. I’m excited for future updates and really appreciate that the creators are taking their time to deliver something high-quality.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review as it really does help to keep me going.  You will be happy to learn that The Haunted Castle dark ride is currently being Imagineered and it is a 25 minute, very immersive, and magical experience that really shows off VR Dark Rides even more than Act 1 of Into the Metaverse.  It will be a free update later this year so keep your eyes on your notifications.  If you cannot wait, feel free to join my Discord and get on the ALPHA channel and see the behind the scenes Imagineering process, plus access to that door with the keypad :-)

reviews.review_description: I thought I could do more rides am I not looking right it’s just the ride through time at the minute if so how do I get other rides??

developer_response.body:
Such a bummer to get a 1* review, but I get your disappointment as I too wish there was more, but it is so much work for 1 person that it takes time.  I hope to make enough money to hire a team eventually, but I have to be honest, 1* reviews really make it harder, especially when the store description clearly states it is only 1 ride so far. Seems unfair, but I also recognize your emotion coming through and that is a good thing as it means I am on to something. Almost all the low reviews are similar which really has killed my sales.  Oh well. At least I do not answer to shareholders that would just have me push out slop to meet demands.  

I ask that when more does come, you update the review as surely the current ride is better than 1*?  Plus the next ride is The Haunted Castle, is well underway and will be in the store as a free update to all later this year.  If you cannot wait, feel free to come over to the Discord and get access to the ALPHA where you can ride the Imagineers version of the ride in progress. It is an epic haunted ride that is over 25 mins long and really really detailed.  Cannot wait to share. You can see some screenshots of the Haunted Castle here:
https://www.metaverse-adventures.com/
Discord
https://discord.gg/CaqCdqq7Vw

reviews.review_description: It’s one ride. Watch the trailer, that’s the game. It’s like riding through animatronics. Not fun. Feel like I got ripped off. The list in game of things in “early planning” is about 95% of the park. Will change review if this game ever changes but right now don’t bother.

developer_response.body: Thanks for helping to make this Theme Park a reality. While it did not meet your expectations despite the description stating exactly what it is today, it will grow over time, so hope to earn more stars as I detect a hint of passion in your review as it seems you want this park to be complete and are angy it is not. Me too actually. Hardest part is how much work it is for one person as I do not make enough to hire more people which reviews like this one only make it harder.

reviews.review_description: Thankyou, thankyou, thankyou! ..your theme park is awe-inspiring  , I can't wait to see and experience it when it is finished. What a fantastic idea, you have loads to imagine and bring into life. This truly is a blast... I can only imagine what the theme park will look like a year or two from now. Please keep me updated and thankyou again for the experience x

developer_response.body: Thank you as well for taking the time to review.  I really appreciate the feedback. Come back next April and the Haunted Castle should be ready which my Alpha testers all agree is even better than Into the Metaverse l. I cannot wait to share and it will be a free update for all park pass holders like yourself.

reviews.review_description: This for sure is one of the best experiences I had so far in VR. When I was a kid, I was lucky to take some rides at Disneyworld/Epcot Center in Florida. That really flashed me. So cool! Americans are the number one when it comes to teach and entertain. But Florida is far away from Munich/Germany (where I live) ... no more. Because now there is a virtual Theme Park opened 24/7. Taking a ride into the Metaverse (the first act of several to come) really brings back memories for me. And there is more to come. Just returning from the Oktoberfest here in Munich, I was wondering why nobody created a ghost-train-experience in VR yet (at the Oktoberfest there minimum three of them). Guess what: It is beeing done right now in the Theme Park. Looking forward to it!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the glowing review.  There is much more to come and will come your way as free updates.  The Haunted Castle is next.

reviews.review_description:
I have always loved dark rides, and since I got my first VR headset (GearVR) I have been hoping to find those kinds of experiences. So, this app is EXACTLY what makes me pumped about the future of VR. The idea that you could have your own "collection" of immersive rides accessible from your home is just fantastic. Although only one ride is currently available, I can see the dev's vision and I am loving it so far. From the walkable queue to the moving safety bars to the attendants that greet you, it's all going towards creating that immersion that I've been looking for. So excited for what's next :)))

P.S. I hope Disney/Universal are taking notes. This is the future of immersive entertainment!!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review. I am so glad you enjoyed.  Please check back every 6 months or so for more content as I am adding all the time and am not planning DLC or extra costs.  I am days away from updating the park with a new, interactive queue for the Haunted Castle that is an attraction in itself. Cannot wait to share. Thanks for the support!!!

reviews.review_description: If you like rides such as Haunted Mansion at Disney World, this is a very similar style to that, only in VR, which is AWESOME! I took a chance on this by getting it long before it was ready for full release, but I am not disappointed. This is shaping up to be one fantastic VR theme park experience and I'm so glad I bought in early to see it as it progresses

developer_response.body: I know you have already seen a preview of the Haunted Castle and have been providing feedback, thank you.  Your ideas and feedback are very helpful.  I  look forward to bringing you more and seeing you in the Imagineers Lounge at somepoint.

reviews.review_description: As an avid theme park enthusiast, this was an incredible experience! It's easy to see in the little details the appreciation this creator has for the rides that inspired Metaverse Adventures. I can't wait to see new rides added to his park!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for taking the time to review.  The Haunted Castle Dark Ride is well underway and I hope to have something to share later this year.  No promisses as it will be ready when it is ready.  Come back ever 6 months over the years as this is LOOOOOONNNGGGG term project that I plan on working on for a very ling time.  Already been 4 years.

reviews.review_description: I love the dark ride Act1 so far and it is nice and long!  Super smooth and feels a lot like spaceship earth lol.  I can’t wait for Act II and Act III and what’s yet to come!  I wasn’t able to do the sneak preview of the Haunted Castle except for walking through.  Out of curiosity, do you know when there will be updates?  Overall, incredible experience and feels so realistic- and it runs so smoothly!

developer_response.body: I am happy to share that in the next week or so, I will be updating the Theme Park that includes a new, detailed and interactive queue for The Haunted Castle.  It is a very cool theme space and if you want to be scared, there are some very cool moments to be had.  Cannot wait to bring to you so keep your eye on your notifications and check back every 6 months to a year to experience new rides as the Theme Park grows.Thanks for the review

reviews.review_title: This is what I want from VR...
reviews.review_description: I always thought the every best VR experiences were the great demos from the DK2 era, where chasing the triple A gaming mirage seemed less important than letting me have the Epcot center in my house. This early access title leans heavily into this vibe - reminding me of the brilliant old Welcome to Oculus demo and promising loads more as things get added. Really good animations that look great in a well paced experience with some lovely surprises along the way. It's not HLAlyx, obviously, but I didn't want it to be - I wanted it to be exactly what it is. Love it.

developer_response.body: Wow...what a great review and insight into the audience who are looking for something beyond games.  This is the sort of feedback that keeps me pressing forward into the unknown as this passion project is growing into something much bigger and I have no idea where it is going other than to be a place I and others love to visit.  Thank you for taking the time to review.

reviews.review_description: Exactly what I was hoping to find in VR! Also one of the few things out there that gives me ZERO MOTION SICKNESS! My favourite virtual reality experience so far, it’s so immersive! 🤩It’s also very re-rideable and heavily detailed! my family loves it too 😁 As a fan of heavily themed immersive experiences and theme parks in general, I’m very happy I found this! A big thanks to the creator and I’m looking forward to seeing more! 😍

developer_response.body:
I am so happy to read you felt no motion discomfort as this was a primary design requirement of mine. In fact I spent many months at the beginning trying all sorts of moves in a dark ride to discover what makes one sick and what does not.  Based on the reviews it looks like I accomplished this as I have not yet had anyone share that they felt ill. The crazy part is, many assume my Theme Park is a rollercoaster ride, which we have all tried and all gotten sick on unfortunately. I have had a number of people tell me they avoided my app because of the fear of getting sick, but hopefully over time I will earn the reputation as a slow moving dark ride Theme Park that anyone can enjoy, even newbies and not get motion sick. Of course, there are surely some outliers that are hyper sensitive, but they are not in VR right now anyways.  Hopefully the tech will improve so they too can enjoy one day.   

Thanks for the review and I look forward to beginning you more content so keep your eyes on your notification as a small update is coming soon.

reviews.review_description: I’m sorry, don’t mean to be rude, but the animations in this aren’t nice, and overall it’s pretty boring. Not sure why it’s getting so much love TBH

developer_response.body: I am sad to read you did not enjoy, but I can appreciate that it is not for everyone. Especially the first ride which is Edutainment based. Maybe the second ride which I am working on now, The Haunted Castle, will be more to your taste, but it will have similar MoCapped animations as I am not a AAA development studio. Maybe one day I will be able to afford better MoCap tech, but I am happy with where the animations are for now as they tell the story.  Either way, you now own a park pass, so come back from time to time over the years and let's see if I earn more stars from you as I am working hard to expand and constantly improve as VR tech allows. Thanks for the candid feedback.

reviews.review_title: So sad that it is only in english.
reviews.review_description: Well done but should be in many languages.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. I do intend to add more languages, but it is challenging as an indie dev as it means less time creating the Theme Park so my focus so far has been getting the basics in place.  I did have Japanese for a while, but no one used it in over a year. What language would you like to see and if it was available, what would your rating have been? I will eventually get to it as I really wish to make it more accessible to a wider range of people.

reviews.review_description: This experience came out and I was curious so I played it and only played it to before Shakespeare came out and I enjoyed it a lot, thought I had to pay for the rest of the acts so I simply uninstalled it. Installed it again because the thumbnail changed, and now I'm hooked!

developer_response.body:
Right...so chill!  You will not have to pay more as you will automatically get new content as it is rolled out as you own a park pass when you bought the original ride. Come back every 6 months to explore new areas and ride content.  I am working hard on The Haunted Castle right now and wow is it ever coming together. Cannot wait to share the detailed, and interactive ride queue area sooner than later before I get into the actual ride.

Thanks for the review

reviews.review_title: If your a fan of EPCOT Center...
reviews.review_description: If you were a fan of Horizons, World of Motion, and Spaceship Earth you will love this.  Not sure why we don't have more experiences like this.

developer_response.body: I am not sure why either as they really work well in VR. I am so glad you enjoyed. Thanks for the review and keep your eye on the notifications a big update is coming that will allow you to ride with others which is surprisingly magical.

reviews.review_title: Wow, the start of a true VR theme park
reviews.review_description:
I love Disney World. When I was waiting for my Quest 2, I saw someone raving that you could watch 360 degree videos of Disney rides on Youtube, and it would save you $1,000s over going to the parks. That is quite an experience, but a true VR dark ride is something entirely different. I would watch a Metaverse Adventures dark ride over a 360 degree video of a Disney-produced ride any day.

With a VR dark ride, unlike 360 degree video, you've got a full 3D experience: some things are up close, some farther away; even a change in the audio as you move your head. It is, as the ride talks about, IMMERSIVE (and like a real life dark ride, not interactive).

I am amazed that what appears to be a very small team of people put together such an incredible experience. There are many "small touches" that make a big difference (like the operating board that the ride operator uses).

I can't wait for the other 2 acts and further dark rides by Metaverse Adventures!

developer_response.body:
A very small team indeed as it is all just 1 person by in large with hired help here and there, but mostly just me...Immersive Matthew.  Hope to grow the team one day but the revenue is just not there today as App Lab is very obscure.

Have you checked the Theme Park lately? I finally updated all the core tech to turn it from a single, seated dark ride, to an open world, explorable Theme Park...albeit small today.  You can even ride Into the Metaverse with a loved one or friend which is surprisingly magical. With that core tech update finally out of the way (was extremely challenging let me tell), I am once again Imagineering new ride content and will be updating the store in the next 2-4 weeks with a very detailed and interactive ride queue for The Haunted Castle of which is currently an empty shell in the store version. Post that, I will be sharing the first scene of The Haunted Castle ride and more of Act 2 as both are in development now. Imagineering is going much faster now that all that core tech is in place. If you have not seen the room scale Theme Park yet, it is worth the visit, and suggest you check again in the new year as there will be more ride content then too. In fact, keep coming back every 6 months or so as you possess a Park Pass and will automatically get new content as it is made available.  Thanks for the review.

reviews.review_description: loved it. Can't wait to see how it goes in the future

developer_response.body: Have you checked the Theme Park lately? I finally updated all the core tech to turn it from a single, seated dark ride, to an open world, explorable Theme Park...albeit small today.  You can even ride Into the Metaverse with a loved one or friend which is surprisingly magical. With that core tech update finally out of the way (was extremely challenging let me tell), I am once again Imagineering new ride content and will be updating the store in the next 2-4 weeks with a very detailed and interactive ride queue for The Haunted Castle of which is currently an empty shell in the store version. Post that, I will be sharing the first ride scene of The Haunted Castle and more of Act 2 of Into the Metaverse as both are in development now. Imagineering is going much faster now that all that core tech is in place. Feel free to keep coming back every 6 months or so as you possess a Park Pass and will automatically get new content as it is made available.  Thanks for the review.

reviews.review_description:
Hi Developer，I am a Chinese User，in the metaverse journey，you talk a about some Chinese History，so，I just wonder，if we can add some "subtitle" and can set the subtitle to show or not at the bottom，I think it will be more friendly

If could，I can help to do the Chinese translation work

developer_response.body:
Hello bau720123, 

You would be pleased to hear I am in the process of adding Mandarin and Japanese to the ride's narration and will also add subtitles at some point too.  Keep your eyes open on the next 2-3 updates (you will see a notification saying it updated).  Love an updated review when you ride the Mandarin version.  If you know of someone for hire for voice talent that you feel may be a candidate and would like to audition for the role, have them contact me at immersive.matthew@Metaverse-Adventures.com. Thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review and share your view/requests.

reviews.review_description: Just downloaded this app and it’s fantastic, reminds me of being on the pleasure beach in Blackpool and riding through the river caves.  I love how it goes through history, I’m so looking forward to Acts 2 and 3 being added in an update. Well done to the developers for making this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review.  I look forward to bringing you the remaining acts, plus so much more as this is the beginning of an entire Theme Park.

reviews.review_description: If you have fond memories of riding Spaceship Earth at EPCOT Center then you'll love this experience. Well done and totally fun. Jump on board!

developer_response.body: Indeed that is one of the rides that served as part of the inspiration along with a few others from that same Theme Park that are no longer.  Looking forward to bringing you more.  Thank you for the reivew.

reviews.review_title: Has the potential to be a massive hit!
reviews.review_description: As an avid theme/amusement park enjoyer I have fell in love with the aspects of dark rides. This demo has captured my attention and evidently my support as I am following up my fantastic experience with a review. All the major ride design, storyline  and immersions which is normally created with billions of dollars by major corporations like Disney, has been effectively captured by the creator. You'll have to experience it in order to believe it, it really feels like you have traversed to your local park and taken a ride on the dark rides.

developer_response.body:
Wow...what a flattering review and I guess you are right in a lot of ways as I too felt this way while Imagineering it. I am just one person so far, but I am Imagineering what a team of hundreds of people would have been doing in the past with physician rides of this scope and detail.

BTW...all those who accessed the free demo like yourself, now own the Into the Metaverse dark ride and Act 1 was just recently published. I hope you enjoy and I look forward to bringing you the remaining 2 acts and then I am off to make the other rides as addons. 

Thanks for the review.
IM

reviews.review_title: Haven’t written a review yet but had to!
reviews.review_description: This app experience is absolutely incredible. It’s super immersive down to the tiniest details and large scene scapes. The lights even reflect perfectly off of the safety sign in the car and the sky scapes are breath taking. I never thought I’d see something as amazing as this in my lifetime but I predict amazing things from this creator. Someone from Disney should absolutely reach out to collaborate. This work is nothing short of amazing and you HAVE to experience it. Seriously.

developer_response.body: Gosh...what a great review and call outs to some of the details I painstakingly added.  It is reviews like this that make the hundreds of hours to get the lights just right, all worth it.  Thank you so much.  Act 1 is now out and is free for all those who downloaded the demo so go ahead and ride again as I think you will love where it has been going.

reviews.review_description: For me, VR should be able to take you places you've never been before, and this ride essentially does that. It takes you to time periods while giving you a brief history of what you're looking at. I tried finding other rides similar to this but nothing compares to how well put together and enjoyable this one is. CANT WAIT FOR MORE!

developer_response.body: I look forward to bringing you more and by supporting this ride and reviewing it too boot, you are helping to make more VR dark rides happen.  Thank you!

reviews.review_description: MORE!

developer_response.body:
Act 1 of Into the Metaverse is now available and as someone who accessed the demo, you get Act 1 for free. In fact you get all 3 Acts with Acts 2 and 3 currently being Imagineered.  Enjoy 

I am also looking forward to bringing many more rides and thanks to people like you, more are coming.

reviews.review_description: This game definitely has potential especially with Theme Park Enthusiasts. The demo is already very well made. I can’t wait till more is added. Plus, I am planning on creating a huge vr rp game that I think I might add in rollercoasters at some point in the development.

developer_response.body: The demo has been updated to Act 1 and all who downloaded the demo now own Act 1 along with the remaining 2 acts when they are available. Let me know what you think as it has come a long way. Hope your ride is coming along well too.  Thanks for the review.

reviews.review_description:
This is an enjoyable throwback to the Fantasyland (Disneyland) dark  rides.  It is more along the lines of "Snow White's Scary Adventure" than "Pirates of the Caribbean".

And there is no 30 minute wait time to board.

Definitely worth  purchasing.

developer_response.body:
I have always loved Snow White and it certainly has some influence here along with some of the bigger rides from EPCOT in Walt Disney World.  I can guarantee there will never be a wait time :-)
 
Thanks for the review.

reviews.review_description:
I purchased the game today and have so far downloaded it twice. Both times it has started to run only to get as far as a black screen with a distant control panel, with what look like levers. On pressing any button everything floats off into the sky and leaves me staring at nothing but a blue sky with clouds. Very pretty but not exactly a game. The screen is not frozen as I can still produce a red light beam with the right direction toggle but it serves no purpose. Any help please.

I won't delete my original post just in case anyone else experiences the same problem. The developers were very quick to respond to my problem and with their help it was resolved. It is not a problem with the software but rather with having more than one account on the same headset. I must say that the app is awesome and being enjoyed by the whole family. A big thank you for all the help guys.

developer_response.body:
Developer here. Sorry to see you are having issues.  You are the second person in 4 years to have this problem and the last person had to factory reset their Quest to solve it as there was an issue with their headset.  I can tell you that others downloaded the same version this week from the store and did not experience this issue like the person who reviewed the day before yours. I have not changed anything in the store since June. I just double checked by downloading it myself from the store and it worked fine so the app is not the issue for sure.  

Please email me at immersive.matthew@metaverse-adventures.com so that we can open a ticket together with Meta to get to the bottom of this as there is really nothing on my end I can do. I hope we can get your sorted out soon as the Theme Park is awesome and will be expanding soon with the next ride.

I appreciate you reaching out here versus a bad rating without a review as this at least gives me the opportunity to address which really helps us indies out.

reviews.review_description: ITS COOL IF YOU WANNA GO THEME PARKING BUT CANT BECAUSE OF COVID AND THERES MORE COMING I HIGHLY SUGGEST DOWNLOADING ITS SHORT BUT COOL

developer_response.body: My thoughts exactly!  Wish I was able to finish it already but it is A LOT of work to optimize for Quest 1.

reviews.review_title: Still my favorite VR experience I’ve had
reviews.review_description: This is what there needs to be more of. The roller coaster games don’t correlate that well to VR, 1 for motion sickness and 2 going down a hill in VR just doesn’t hit the same as a real roller coaster. But this isn’t that, this is similar to the slow dark rides you’d find at Disney or other amusement parks. Where you’d sit back relax and enjoy the scenery and story telling without any motion sickness. And the plans for the game make me excited to see the other rides. It’s gonna be like a little theme park of slow, relaxing rides with great story telling and scenery. Do yourself a favor and buy it, I’ve enjoyed the experience every time!

developer_response.body:
Nice to see people are understanding the scope of the Theme Park as it has been a bit of an uphill battle let me tell you.  Many assume it is like the rollercoaster apps which makes even the most seasoned VR user motion sick.  I have worked super hard to ensure even newbies do not get motion sick and based on all the reviews, it looks like I nailed it.  

Here is something you may not be aware of, your purchase (be it from when it was free of for a fee), includes updates to the Theme Park like the next ride, The Haunted Castle, so keep checking in every 6 months to a year and see what is new or if you cannot wait that long, come on over to the Discord and sign up for the ALPHA and be apart of the growing community of supporters.

Thanks so much for the review and I look forward to bringing you much more over the next 5-10 years.

reviews.review_description: I was looking for something like that where it feels like a Disney ride but one that also doesn’t cause nausea. This was really an outstanding experience. I can’t wait for what’s to come next (hopefully soon?).

developer_response.body:
I love reading reviews like this as I made this Theme Park for people like you.  Super excited to bring you the next ride being Imagineering right now (The Haunted Castle) as it is shaping up to truly be something magical.  I am really unsure when it will be ready as I do not put dates out or even set a timeline for myself as for me, the quality of the experience is the focus and not shareholder returns as I refuse to let them get involved.  That said, I am making killer progress with the Haunted Castle and hope to have something out in the next 6 months to a year...could be sooner, could be later.  Just keep checking back every six months, and for the years following as I intend to just keep adding rides and not upsell new rides (no DLC).  It is the app that will keep on giving over the years to those who took the chance on the title early.  So thank you.  Price will go up for new guests once the next ride is added. 


If you want to see the behind the scenes Imagineerin process and a sneak peak at the Haunted Castle, come on over to the discord (link in description).  Those who get involved also get the keycode to that door :-)

reviews.review_description: I would love to see more VR experiences like this!

developer_response.body: By making the purchase and leaving this review, you are for sure helping to make more VR dark rides a reality.  Thank you

reviews.review_title: From an old Theme Park Lover
reviews.review_description:
I am an oldster (per se), we'll just say 60+, and have worked in theme parks, designed ride ideas and theming since forever ago. I own a lot of Oculus games that I enjoy immensely. I got this kind of on a whim. I was not expecting what I got.

This is probably my favorite Oculus program in my library, and it's only a demo. Everything about this is like being at a theme park, including interactions going on in the common area and the loading station. Even the warning label on the inside of the car. Everything is here.
My God, this is a beautiful piece of work. And the soundtrack, the narration...
Makes me wish I was a Quest Dev, because I would love to add my ideas, but I'm more than willing to wait for updates.

This may not be a "game", but it is a stunning experience, and I see nothing but great things coming out of this. Especially, if you are a fan of dark rides!! I will be spreading the word to my friends and family who have Oculus.

Just ride it once. It's free. What's the harm? I don't think you will be disappointed.

developer_response.body: Wow Edward! Your review warrants a response as it sure made me smile. I am nearly 50 myself, but still very young in the head and working hard to bring VR dark rides to those who love them, especially people like you who get what a good dark ride is. So glad you are part of this journey and enjoying the results so far.  Feel free to join me on my Discord (link in the description) or YouTube channel for behind the scenes of Imagineering.  The most recent scenes I have been working on I am told are the best yet.  You too can access the official ALPHA channel too over on Discord and see behind the scenes now, or just wait as I will be updating the store soon with new scenes.  Thanks for taking the time to write a review and for promoting where you can. See you in the Metaverse.

reviews.review_title: would be more stars,but not been up date
reviews.review_description: good first time,better if it gets up dated.what i mean once the other  things have been done like the ghost house ,and the micro scope, and jungle have been done.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. I understand the disappointment as I too look forward to all those areas being complete one day.  It will take me years, but that is ok as this is a long term project for me that will be at least a decade if not more if things flow that way of course. Right now it is a labor of love as titles on App Lab are near invisible to the vast majority of users unfortunately and thus I cannot hire a team to speed things up. I wish I could but I am not a deep pocket corporation. I am ok with this as it gives me the freedom to really focus on quality of experience over profit.  I wish to stay on App Lab as this is the right place for early access, incomplete experiences. When all the areas you mentioned are done, then I will move over to the main store and still continue to Imagineer more.  It is like Disneyland…never complete. 

If you love what I am doing and want to see more, letting others know all about it via your review is a great way to help others find the Theme Park along with spreading the word where appropriate online as there has to be many others who would love to see what is brewing here and support its development/Imagineering.  It is the only Theme Park that is actually a Theme Park and not a rollercoaster app or fair.

If you like to see what is coming up next before it hits the store, feel free to DM me on the Discord and ask for an invite to the ALPHA Channel. Will be sharing more Haunted Castle content there including the first scare if that interests you. If not, it will be on the main store at some point to post community testing and feedback. Just keep your eye on your notifications as I update the Theme Park frequently.    

Thank you for your support and I look forward to bringing you more and earning more stars.

reviews.review_title: THIS, is what we need more of!
reviews.review_description:
I downloaded this one 2 years ago right after I purchased our Q2 headsets. I go back to it so often, just hoping there will be more added. When I saw the performance at the Globe theatre, I was totally SHOCKED at how amazing the artistic direction this ride was going, and just how much I felt a part of the experience itself. You feel like you're there!! 

I have always been a HUGE fan of dark rides. From Old Chicago in the 70s and their "The Four Seasons" dark ride, to Disney Land and Disney World's dark ride gems aplenty, and then that awesome "Adventures of Sinbad" @Lotte World in Seoul, Korea. I simply can't get enough of em! I believe that this platform is PERFECT for that kind of thing. 

I mean, look...I don't mind shooting zombies, etc., but sometimes a person just wants to chill and enjoy the ride! If every dev realized how much time they could save avoiding combat mechanics and just designed a fabulous journey of escapism, we experience junkies would buy em left and right. They're just too fun, immersive, and perfect after a busy day as a lovely way to wind down.
 I want to thank y'all for providing such a beautiful, and educational experience. I can't wait to see more! If you're new to Quest 2-3, you love dark rides? Get it...like, right now!!

developer_response.body:
First, thank you for putting "Adventures of Sinbad" at Lotte world on my radar as it is now on my to do list. Second, thank you for the review and feedback on what you loved about it.  

You will be happy to learn that more content is coming.  Specifically The Haunted Castle and Into the Metaverse Act 2 as both are being working on right now.  I would have had one of them already done, but I instead spent nearly a year reworking everything so that I could take it from 1 dark ride, to a legit Theme Park with many rides and the ability to ride with others.  Was a lot of very challenging work that I am glad is complete as I too just want more content. With all the core tech now in place, I am able to Imagineer much faster.  

As you may know, your purchase was for a Park Pass and thus you will get future rides so keep checking back every 6 months or so to see what is new.  Right now I am nearing a small update that takes the shell of The Haunted Castle ride queue, and flushes it out, including a number of interactive elements that I am very excited to share.  Keep your eye on your Meta Notifications as that update is coming soon.

I look forward to bringing you much more content.

Cheers,
Immersive Matthew

reviews.review_description: crazy how it feels like your in the moment. it kinda feels like you’re at disney and you are on the most immersive experience possible.

developer_response.body: That feels good to read as that is exactly the feeling I have worked very very hard to create.  Been a crazy 3.7 years journey, mostly inventing all the tech to make it all so seamless with no load screens as that would break immersion on the rides.  Thanks for the review!  Keep an eye on your notifications as the first "scare" and a more complete queue is coming for The Haunted Castle.

reviews.review_title: Very nice!  Brings back fond memories!
reviews.review_description: I used to love these types of rides in my youth.  Childhood wasn't always that good to me, so it is nice to be able to reminisce about those good time I did have.  Thank you for that, it means more than you will ever realize.  I enjoyed it so much, I even bought copies for my wife and son.  Looking forward to seeing this app grow!

developer_response.body: Wow...this review legit made me feel emotional as I made it for people like you.  Thank you for taking the time to share this and thank you for all the purchases.  For sure helps make VR dark rides happen.  I look forward to bringing you more.

reviews.review_title: Can’t wait for the full ride!
reviews.review_description: One of my favorite apps, feels like I am at Epcot!

developer_response.body: I am so glad you felt like you were at EPCOT again as bringing that sort of theme park and beyond to VR is my goal.  Some Edutainment dark rides and some just fun is my goal. Thanks for the review and support!!

reviews.review_description:
This reminds me of the dark rides I experienced at Epcot the one time I went there as a kid the year it opened, or the one at Kennywood, though that one was Halloween-themed.  A big reason of why I got into VR was for Walkabout with family across the country, which blurs the line between game and experience.  I've since bought straight-up games, but feel that experiences are just as important to VR.  Maybe even more so, as experiences in real life are inconvenient, and, quite frankly, often surprisingly expensive.  

You can read up on the creator's plans to flesh out this ride on the Discord channel.  Adding two more acts is just the beginning.  Even as it stands I don't feel that this is a once-and-done experience.  I ran through it multiple times the first day, and still hadn't located all of the hidden items.  Every room is different, and it's refreshing to have an experience where everything just works as you'd expect them to do in real life and not be distracted by weird clipping and visual artifacts.

I really like the app, and it's only going to get better over time.

developer_response.body: Thanks for being a key member on the Discord and a major supporting of the growing Theme Park.

reviews.review_description: I have shared the game with my families and friends. I like the cultural trip this game takes me. It's a museum.

developer_response.body:
I am so happy to read that you shared with friends and family as I Imagineered it to be accessbile to all and everyone. Thank you for the review. 

Act 1 is available NOW and is free to you and to all those who accessed the demo as my way of saying thank you. You will also get act 2 and 3 for free when they are available too so keep your eye on your notifications. Thank you for the review and I look forward to sharing more dark rides with you.

reviews.review_description: I loved this experience and would love to see more. I think that it would be awesome if you made a amusement park full of dark rides. You could add small drops and other things to them too. Great game

developer_response.body: I am thinking the same way.  The Haunted Castle is the next ride and I habe already started research on it as it is based off some true events.  You may have noticed that ride in the court yard, but if not, look around that loading area where you click the red button as there is more to see. :) I cannot wait to bring more.

reviews.review_title: This is what VR was made for...
reviews.review_description:
This VR experience is what is commonly known as a "Dark Ride", where you ride a small 1-2 person cart in a dark environment and on specific parts there's animatronics, sounds and music. If you've ever been to Disney or Epcot and have ridden dark rides like Spaceship Earth, Haunted House, Pirates of the Carribean or similar then you have an idea of what this VR experience is all about.

This is a good experience to share with others who have fond memories of times long past in theme park history or to share with those who has never been in a theme park at all.

Highly Recommended.

developer_response.body: Great review that captures all the things I wish I could say in the description.  Thank you for your support and review.  I look forward to bringing you more.

reviews.review_description: Very well put together, looking forward to more from this game.

developer_response.body: Act 1 is available NOW and is free to you and to all those who accessed the demo as my way of saying thank you. You will also get act 2 and 3 for free when they are available too so keep your eye on your notifications. Thank you for the review and I look forward to sharing more dark rides with you.

reviews.review_description:
What’s great about it: Excellent theme; perfect script and narration; educational and entertaining at the same time; great music and sound effects; wonderful environments; good graphics.

Opportunities to make it even better: I’d love for the characters to show more detail and realism and give me eye contact. In my opinion, the retro pixulated approach to some of the graphics, such as the metaverse “logo” does not align with the rest of the visuals. 

All in all, this is an outstanding experience with incredible potential. After the developers finish the first ride, they can build an entire theme park that – do I dare say it – can be even better than Disney and the like.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review and constructive criticisms. I really appreciate and will give them all some thought as you are not the only one to raise these. AND did I read, even better than Disney.  WOW.  Crazy part is, that is the second review I have read that.  I am flattered. 

Act 1 of Into the Metaverse is now available and as someone who accessed the demo, you get Act 1 for free. In fact you get all 3 Acts with Acts 2 and 3 currently being Imagineered.  Enjoy
